title: Academy (LMS) — Learner Side

preflight.note: off-camera: stage the shared persisted sidebar preference expanded so the Academy sidebar reads with labels after step 1's navigation. #wc-rail-panel-toggle (title 'Toggle sidebar') is the genuine control; probe-verified July 11 it flips localStorage washcentral-sidebar-collapsed-v5 to 'false' globally, so lms-home loads expanded (aside.sidebar 220px, .menu-header at x102 w203). Skipped when already expanded. Pure UI-state preference — no record is created, edited, or sent.

ops.note: start page identity before capture: the recording opens on command-center.html (startUrl); step 1 clicks the graduation-cap Academy rail icon to enter the Academy
command-center settled, no skeletons
step 1 (p01): enter from the bottom-left corner toward the graduation-cap Academy rail icon
step 1 (p01): settle on the graduation cap as 'WashCentral ships with its own training platform, the Academy' plays
step 1 (p02): rest on the graduation cap as 'Click the graduation cap' is spoken

step 1 (p02): genuine rail navigation. Reading assets/app.js, the .wc-rail-item handler is `sessionStorage.setItem('wc-sidebar-force-expand','1'); location.href='lms-home.html'` (probe-verified July 11) — pure navigation, no record mutation. Press lands in the p02→p03 gap so My Dashboard is on screen while 'You land on My Dashboard' plays.
landed on My Dashboard (lms-home.html)
the rail click force-expanded the Academy sidebar; abort the take if collapsed
loaded: 4 progress tiles, the Continue Learning hero, 6 course cards, breadcrumb 'Academy › My Dashboard', no agent-service error
the ACADEMY sidebar group shows all four learner destinations

read-only tour proof: after the single step-1 navigation the page never leaves My Dashboard — every course, Start button, View All, Browse Catalog, leaderboard link, Quick Link, and sidebar destination is pointed at, never pressed.
enrollment guardrail: all four tiles stay 0, the hero stays '0% complete', and all six course cards stay 'Not started' the whole lesson — proves nothing was enrolled or started.
